personas.name_zh: 都市自我犒赏型消费者
personas.jtbd_zh: 在压力、下班、周末或情绪时刻获得高品质的小奖励
personas.jtbd_en: Enjoy a high-quality personal reward after work, on weekends or during emotional moments.

personas.name_zh: 情侣 / 约会型消费者
personas.jtbd_zh: 为约会、纪念日和共享时刻增加轻仪式感
personas.jtbd_en: Add a sense of occasion to dates, anniversaries and shared moments.

personas.name_zh: 礼赠 / 节庆购买者
personas.jtbd_zh: 选择体面、不出错、有情绪价值的礼物
personas.jtbd_en: Choose a presentable, safe and emotionally meaningful gift.

personas.name_zh: 居家甜品家庭分享者
personas.jtbd_zh: 把高品质甜品带入家庭分享时刻
personas.jtbd_en: Bring a premium dessert into family-sharing moments at home.

personas.name_zh: 零售 / 餐饮渠道客户
personas.jtbd_zh: 优化产品组合、动销、毛利、周转和渠道适配
personas.jtbd_en: Optimize assortment, sell-through, margin, turnover and channel fit.

personas.name_zh: 家庭晚餐决策者
personas.jtbd_zh: 快速、安心地解决家人愿意吃的一顿晚餐
personas.jtbd_en: Put a quick, trusted dinner on the table that the family will accept.

personas.name_zh: 年轻独居 / 小家庭
personas.jtbd_zh: 不做复杂烹饪，也不想用低质量外卖将就
personas.jtbd_en: Avoid complex cooking without settling for low-quality takeaway.

personas.name_zh: 定制化家庭餐食需求
personas.jtbd_zh: 为不同家庭成员安排可靠、快速、可调整的早餐、加餐或正餐选择
personas.jtbd_en: Plan reliable, quick and adjustable meals for different family members across breakfast, snacks and everyday meals.

personas.name_zh: 节令团圆购买者
personas.jtbd_zh: 在冬至、春节、元宵等节点兼顾传统、便利与团圆感
personas.jtbd_en: Balance tradition, convenience and togetherness during seasonal occasions.

personas.name_zh: 品质与性价比平衡型用户
personas.jtbd_zh: 在品质、安全、份量与价格之间找到“值得”
personas.jtbd_en: Find the right balance of quality, safety, portion and price.

personas.name_zh: 渠道客户
personas.jtbd_zh: 优化货架、冷柜、补货、周转、毛利与执行一致性
personas.jtbd_en: Optimize shelf, freezer, replenishment, turnover, margin and execution consistency.

personas.name_zh: 家庭餐桌决策者
personas.jtbd_zh: 在时间、营养与家庭接受度之间完成日常餐食决策
personas.jtbd_en: Balance time, nutrition and family acceptance in everyday meal decisions.

personas.name_zh: 都市自我犒赏型消费者
personas.jtbd_zh: 用高品质产品获得即时情绪奖励
personas.jtbd_en: Use a premium product as an immediate emotional reward.

personas.name_zh: 礼赠与节令购买者
personas.jtbd_zh: 在节日、关系与团聚时刻选择合适产品
personas.jtbd_en: Choose the right product for festivals, relationships and reunion moments.

personas.name_zh: 年轻独居与小家庭
personas.jtbd_zh: 用更少准备获得不将就的便利体验
personas.jtbd_en: Get a convenient but non-compromised experience with minimal preparation.

personas.name_zh: 成分与健康关注者
personas.jtbd_zh: 看懂配料、营养与健康价值后再做选择
personas.jtbd_en: Understand ingredients, nutrition and health value before choosing.

personas.name_zh: 渠道与 B2B 客户
personas.jtbd_zh: 用数据优化组合、库存、毛利与渠道执行
personas.jtbd_en: Use data to optimize assortment, inventory, margin and channel execution.

personas.name_zh: 管理层 / 业务发起人
personas.jtbd_en: Define business priorities, sponsor decisions and unlock resources.
personas.jtbd_zh: 明确业务优先级、推动决策并协调资源

personas.name_zh: 消费者洞察经理
personas.jtbd_en: Turn fragmented consumer and market signals into actionable insight.
personas.jtbd_zh: 将分散的消费者与市场信号转化为可行动洞察

personas.name_zh: 品牌 / 市场经理
personas.jtbd_en: Plan brand growth, campaigns, audiences and investment choices.
personas.jtbd_zh: 规划品牌增长、活动、受众与投资选择

personas.name_zh: 产品创新 / 研发经理
personas.jtbd_en: Translate insight into product, flavor, formula and packaging innovation.
personas.jtbd_zh: 把洞察转化为产品、口味、配方与包装创新

personas.name_zh: 电商 / CRM / 内容运营经理
personas.jtbd_en: Operate digital touchpoints, content, CRM and conversion journeys.
personas.jtbd_zh: 运营数字触点、内容、CRM 与转化旅程

personas.name_zh: 销售 / 大客户 / 渠道 / 店头执行经理
personas.jtbd_en: Drive customer plans, assortment, promotion and retail execution.
personas.jtbd_zh: 推动客户计划、商品组合、促销与店头执行

personas.name_zh: 需求 / 供应 / 采购计划人员
personas.jtbd_en: Balance demand, supply, materials, inventory and procurement.
personas.jtbd_zh: 平衡需求、供应、原料、库存与采购

personas.name_zh: 制造 / 质量 / 物流经理
personas.jtbd_en: Deliver stable production, quality, logistics and operational reliability.
personas.jtbd_zh: 保障生产、质量、物流与运营稳定性

personas.name_zh: 客服 / 客户运营团队
personas.jtbd_en: Resolve consumer questions, complaints and service issues efficiently.
personas.jtbd_zh: 高效解决消费者咨询、投诉与服务问题

personas.name_zh: 法务 / 合规 / 财务 / 内控团队
personas.jtbd_en: Protect brand, regulatory, financial and operating controls.
personas.jtbd_zh: 保障品牌、法规、财务与经营控制

personas.name_en: AI / Data / IT Product Lead / PMO
personas.name_zh: AI / 数据 / IT 产品负责人 / PMO
personas.jtbd_en: Build reusable data, AI, agent and governance capabilities.
personas.jtbd_zh: 建设可复用的数据、AI、Agent 与治理能力

personas.name_zh: 消费者洞察 / 市场情报
personas.jtbd_en: Capture and interpret market, consumer and competitor signals.
personas.jtbd_zh: 接入并解释市场、消费者与竞品信号

personas.name_zh: 品牌 / 市场 / 财务规划
personas.jtbd_en: Allocate brand, campaign and investment resources.
personas.jtbd_zh: 配置品牌、活动与投资资源

personas.name_zh: 研发 / 产品创新
personas.jtbd_en: Convert opportunity into validated product and portfolio decisions.
personas.jtbd_zh: 把机会转化为经过验证的产品与组合决策

personas.name_zh: 需求 / 供应 / 采购计划
personas.jtbd_en: Synchronize demand, supply, procurement and capacity plans.
personas.jtbd_zh: 同步需求、供应、采购与产能计划

personas.name_zh: 制造 / 质量
personas.jtbd_en: Execute production and protect quality and asset reliability.
personas.jtbd_zh: 执行生产并保障质量与设备可靠性

personas.name_zh: 仓储 / 物流 / 客户运营
personas.jtbd_en: Manage inventory, fulfillment, cold chain and customer operations.
personas.jtbd_zh: 管理库存、履约、冷链与客户运营

personas.name_zh: 销售 / KA / 渠道 / 零售执行
personas.jtbd_en: Drive sell-in, sell-out, trade plans and in-store execution.
personas.jtbd_zh: 推动进货、动销、Trade 计划与店头执行

personas.name_zh: 法务 / 合规 / 内控
personas.jtbd_en: Control regulatory, quality, brand and operating risks.
personas.jtbd_zh: 控制法规、质量、品牌与经营风险

personas.name_zh: 管理层 / PMO / AI 团队
personas.jtbd_en: Govern value, priorities, portfolio reuse and scaling.
personas.jtbd_zh: 治理价值、优先级、组合复用与规模化

情侣 / 约会型消费者
零售 / 餐饮渠道客户
品质与性价比平衡型用户
都市自我犒赏型消费者

employee.name_zh: AI / 数据 / IT 产品负责人 / PMO

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 下班后、周末或压力时刻的哈根达斯自我犒赏需求
scenario_catalog.description_en: After-work, weekend or stress moments trigger a Häagen-Dazs self-treat need.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 生日、节日、纪念日、约会或拜访带来的礼赠 / 仪式需求
scenario_catalog.description_en: Birthdays, festivals, anniversaries, dates or visits trigger gifting and occasion needs.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 17:00 下班前后出现的家庭晚餐、快手餐或定制化家庭餐需求
scenario_catalog.description_en: Around 5 pm, family dinner, quick-meal or customized family-meal needs emerge.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 冬至、春节、元宵、寒潮、节气等造成的季节性需求波峰
scenario_catalog.description_en: Seasonal occasions and cold weather create demand peaks.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 探索口味、新品、限定、礼盒和家庭分享组合
scenario_catalog.description_en: Explore flavors, new launches, limited editions, gift boxes and sharing combinations.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 寻找快手晚餐、早餐、夜宵、定制化家庭餐和节令菜单灵感
scenario_catalog.description_en: Find quick dinner, breakfast, late-night, customized family-meal and seasonal menu inspiration.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 通过社媒、电商、搜索、AI 搜索和门店陈列发现品牌与产品内容
scenario_catalog.description_en: Discover products through social, commerce, search, AI search and retail content.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 比较礼盒、口味、规格、价格、场合适配与收礼对象偏好
scenario_catalog.description_en: Compare gift boxes, flavors, sizes, price, occasion fit and recipient preference.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 比较一人食、家庭装、定制化家庭餐、节令装的份量、价格和适用方式
scenario_catalog.description_en: Compare solo, family, customized family and seasonal packs by portion, price and usage.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 判断食材、糖、盐、营养、配料、过敏原与健康价值
scenario_catalog.description_en: Assess ingredients, sugar, salt, nutrition, allergens and health value.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 通过 O2O、电商或小程序即时购买、支付并完成配送 / 自提
scenario_catalog.description_en: Purchase, pay and receive via O2O, e-commerce, mini-program, delivery or pickup.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 在商超、会员店、便利店、电商和餐饮渠道完成 SKU、价格与促销选择
scenario_catalog.description_en: Choose SKU, price, promotion and inventory across retail and foodservice channels.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 家庭甜品、约会、自我犒赏、开盒与第一口的 premium experience
scenario_catalog.description_en: Experience self-treat, date, home dessert sharing, unboxing and the first bite.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 水饺、馄饨、汤圆等煮、煎、蒸、空气炸锅的烹饪与食用体验
scenario_catalog.description_en: Prepare and enjoy dumplings, wontons and tangyuan by boiling, frying, steaming or air-frying.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 通过社媒、电商评价、客服、投诉、门店反馈表达体验或寻求支持
scenario_catalog.description_en: Express experience or seek support through reviews, service, complaints and store feedback.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 分享 UGC、甜品时刻、菜谱、烹饪方式和生活方式内容
scenario_catalog.description_en: Share UGC, dessert moments, recipes, cooking methods and lifestyle content.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 围绕下一个约会、节日、礼赠、聚会或自我犒赏进行场合型复购
scenario_catalog.description_en: Repurchase around the next date, festival, gift, gathering or self-treat occasion.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 围绕家庭消耗周期进行常备、补货、囤货、会员复购和推荐
scenario_catalog.description_en: Replenish, stock up, repurchase and recommend around household consumption cycles.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 将增长、渠道、供应或风险问题从会议、邮件和报表中结构化
scenario_catalog.description_en: Structure growth, channel, supply or risk questions from meetings, emails and reports.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 将新趋势、新需求和新反馈转化为统一的机会 intake 与 owner
scenario_catalog.description_en: Turn trends, needs and feedback into a consistent opportunity intake with ownership.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 搜索历史 campaign、素材、效果、品牌规范和经验
scenario_catalog.description_en: Search historical campaigns, assets, results, brand rules and lessons.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 汇集零售商、SKU、促销、库存、价格和渠道信息
scenario_catalog.description_en: Gather retailer, SKU, promotion, inventory, price and channel information.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 统一查询研究、评论、消费者证据和概念测试结果
scenario_catalog.description_en: Query research, reviews, consumer evidence and concept-test results in one place.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 汇总评论、社媒、调研和定量数据形成消费者洞察
scenario_catalog.description_en: Synthesize reviews, social, research and quantitative data into insight.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 基于市场信号生成 campaign、内容和场景假设
scenario_catalog.description_en: Generate campaign, content and occasion hypotheses from market signals.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 解释销量波动、预测偏差、缺货或积压原因
scenario_catalog.description_en: Explain sales shifts, forecast error, stock-outs and excess inventory.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 使用统一数据和指标完成跨职能联合评审
scenario_catalog.description_en: Run cross-functional review with common data and metrics.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 审核内容、产品声明、配方、包装、法规与品牌风险
scenario_catalog.description_en: Review content, product claims, formulas, packaging, regulation and brand risk.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 将决策拆解为 campaign、受众、内容、渠道和排期计划
scenario_catalog.description_en: Translate decisions into campaign, audience, content, channel and schedule plans.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 形成渠道策略、SKU 组合、促销、价格和客户行动计划
scenario_catalog.description_en: Create channel strategy, SKU mix, promotion, pricing and customer action plans.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 将预测转化为排产、采购、库存和补货动作
scenario_catalog.description_en: Turn forecasts into production, procurement, inventory and replenishment actions.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 规模化生成和本地化内容，同时确保品牌与合规一致性
scenario_catalog.description_en: Generate and localize content at scale while preserving brand and compliance.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 识别店头货架、陈列、缺货、价格和促销问题并整改
scenario_catalog.description_en: Detect and correct shelf, display, stock-out, price and promotion issues.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 自动回答重复咨询、分类反馈并辅助客服处理
scenario_catalog.description_en: Automate common answers, classify feedback and assist customer service.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 将项目、campaign、预测和运营经验沉淀为知识与 Agent
scenario_catalog.description_en: Convert project, campaign, forecast and operating lessons into reusable knowledge and agents.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 统一管理 AI 用例的价值、风险、成熟度、资源与规模化状态
scenario_catalog.description_en: Govern AI use-case value, risk, maturity, resources and scaling status.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 汇集社媒、电商、POS、天气、节日、竞品和消费者信号
scenario_catalog.description_en: Ingest social, commerce, POS, weather, festival, competitor and consumer signals.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 接入零售商 sell-out、店头反馈、促销、库存与渠道信号
scenario_catalog.description_en: Ingest retailer sell-out, store feedback, promotion, inventory and channel signals.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 将节令、天气、促销和区域差异纳入需求预测
scenario_catalog.description_en: Include seasonality, weather, promotion and regional differences in demand forecasting.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 模拟活动预算、品牌投资和渠道资源分配方案
scenario_catalog.description_en: Simulate campaign budget, brand investment and channel resource options.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 联动需求、原料、采购、产能与生产计划
scenario_catalog.description_en: Synchronize demand, materials, procurement, capacity and production planning.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 进行新品、口味、包装和概念的 AI 消费者测试
scenario_catalog.description_en: Run AI-enabled consumer testing for products, flavors, packaging and concepts.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 比较活动、内容、受众、渠道和上市方案
scenario_catalog.description_en: Compare campaign, content, audience, channel and launch options.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 优化 SKU × 区域 × 渠道的供应与库存分配
scenario_catalog.description_en: Optimize supply and inventory allocation by SKU, region and channel.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 用计算机视觉进行生产质量检测和异常识别
scenario_catalog.description_en: Use computer vision for quality inspection and anomaly detection.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 根据需求、库存和节令变化生成补货与调拨建议
scenario_catalog.description_en: Generate replenishment and transfer recommendations from demand, inventory and seasonality.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 监测货架、冷柜、陈列、价格和促销执行并整改
scenario_catalog.description_en: Monitor shelf, freezer, display, price and promotion execution and close the loop.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 实时发现销量、转化、渠道或区域异常并触发行动
scenario_catalog.description_en: Detect sales, conversion, channel or regional anomalies and trigger action.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 监控订单、配送、冷链、缺货、取消和履约异常
scenario_catalog.description_en: Monitor orders, delivery, cold chain, stock-outs, cancellations and fulfillment issues.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 统一营销归因、活动 ROI、渠道投资和经营结果评审
scenario_catalog.description_en: Align attribution, campaign ROI, channel investment and business result review.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 评审质量、内容、法规、品牌和经营风险
scenario_catalog.description_en: Review quality, content, regulatory, brand and operating risks.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 分析原料价格、采购成本、供应商与供应风险
scenario_catalog.description_en: Analyze material price, procurement cost, supplier and supply risks.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 将复盘结论回写模型、规则、流程、知识与下一轮计划
scenario_catalog.description_en: Write lessons back into models, rules, processes, knowledge and the next plan.

scenario_catalog.description_zh: 从点状 PoC 转向跨品牌 AI 组合、平台复用与规模化治理
scenario_catalog.description_en: Move from isolated PoCs to cross-brand AI portfolios, platform reuse and scaled governance.
